name: awesome-agent-skills
description: Open-source agent skills for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI and more

plugins.name: research-and-grill
plugins.description: Research any topic from the web, then get grilled with Socratic questions. Scales question depth to how much was researched.

plugins.name: pr-narrative
plugins.description: Generate a human PR title and description from git diff and commit history. Creates or updates the PR on GitHub automatically.

plugins.name: pattern-enforcer
plugins.description: Scan the codebase for existing patterns before implementing anything. Enforces consistency across UI components, error handling, tests, and naming.

plugins.name: react-conventions
plugins.description: Build React data fetching, mutations, and forms the right way. Matches the codebase's existing approach; prescribes React Query and React Hook Form + Zod only when no pattern exists.

plugins.name: ui-completeness
plugins.description: Verification pass after building a React UI component. Sweeps for the four data states (loading, error, empty, success) and responsive issues, then fixes gaps using the codebase's existing components.
